name: R-9 each deprecated: true token declares replaced_by pointing at the successor token per the §26 schema
command: node -e 'const y=require("fs").readFileSync(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT+"/design-tokens/registry.yaml","utf8");const blocks=y.split(/^  - id: /m).slice(1);const dep=blocks.filter(b=>/^\s*deprecated: true/m.test(b));process.exit(dep.length>=1&&dep.every(b=>/^\s*replaced_by: \S+/m.test(b))?0:1)' && echo ok 1>&2
